theme_and_archetype.rationale: ZenStay is a premium retreat for peaceful, low-noise stays. The aesthetic must feel grounding, calming, and highly trustworthy, resembling organic textures (nature, stone, sand, sage) instead of typical aggressive e-commerce UI.

typography.strategy: The Old Money Tech (Classic Serif Head + Sterile Body)

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-medium

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy (Generous use of negative space to invoke calm)
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for inner paddings. Avoid cramped blocks.
spacing_and_layout.grids: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID (For Marketing / Portfolios / Visuals). Asymmetrical listing presentations, varying card heights, 'bento' grid elements in the 'Why ZenStay' section.
spacing_and_layout.hero_section: Generous padding, high-end editorial overlay. Limit overlay to bg-black/40 if over images. Use the provided abstract background image.
spacing_and_layout.corners: Subtle roundness (rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for badges/buttons) to mimic organic shapes.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/70 with 1px border-border/40) allowing page to scroll underneath.
surface_strategies.cards: Neumorphism & Flat mix. Solid backgrounds, very subtle shadow-sm, 1px border. On hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border-primary/20.
surface_strategies.noise_badge: Must be highly visible on listing cards. Use a pulsing dot (animate-pulse bg-green-500) next to '< 35 dB'.

motion_and_interactions.buttons: transition-transform duration-200 active:scale-95. Hover states must explicitly change text color and darken/lighten background.
motion_and_interactions.stagger: Listings grid should stagger in on load.

listings.alt: Cozy wooden cabin in a snowy forest
Outdoor pool at a serene ocean house

component_rules.forms: Shadcn components heavily customized (Input, Select, Form). Increase padding on inputs for a premium feel (h-12 or h-14).
component_rules.date_picker: Shadcn Calendar with Popover. Do not use native input type=date.
component_rules.badges: Custom '< 35 dB' badge must be prominently displayed on every listing card. It represents the USP (Unique Selling Proposition) of ZenStay.
component_rules.testing: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` in kebab-case format (e.g., `data-testid="booking-submit-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind using the colors from 'color_palette'. Setup a theme toggle to switch between light and dark modes easily.
2. Add font imports for 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope'. Ensure Cormorant is used for headings.
3. Build the hero section with a search bar (location, dates, travelers) over the 'hero_background'.
4. The 6 listings MUST use the provided URLs from 'media_urls.listings'. Include the '< 35 dB' noise badge on each card.
5. Follow 'The Old Money Tech' typography strategy: Serifs for headings, strict sans-serif for UI/body text.
6. Build the 'Why ZenStay' section using the bento grid strategy (asymmetrical cards).
7. Include dark mode logic to invert the UI seamlessly.
8. Include bilingual text (FR/EN) capabilities (a simple context or state mapping is fine).
9. Build Google Auth and Stripe checkout flows correctly as per MVP.
10. All action components (buttons, links, forms) MUST have `data-testid` attributes.
11. Strictly use .js or .jsx for frontend files, no .tsx.
